title: ついに集まったチームメンバー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've finally gathered enough members to form a
team, and we can now enter the Unity Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our training level will go up based on our team
ranking in the Unity Cup, so I'm hoping to win as
many races as possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But first, I need to decide on a team name. I think
the name I came up with—Team Carrot—has a
nice ring to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I fill in our name on the form as "Team Carrot."
That makes it official!
